hero.title: Generate Stunning AI Wallpapers
hero.description:
Transform your ideas into beautiful wallpapers with AI.
Just type a prompt, choose a style, and download in seconds.

introduce.title: AI-Powered Wallpaper Creation
introduce.label: About
introduce.description: Create unique, high-quality wallpapers for any device using advanced AI image generation technology.

items.title: Text to Wallpaper
items.description: Simply describe your dream wallpaper and our AI generates it instantly. No design skills needed.

items.title: Multiple AI Models
items.description: Choose from various AI models optimized for different wallpaper styles - realistic, anime, abstract, and more.

items.title: High Resolution Output
items.description: Generate wallpapers in stunning high resolution, perfect for desktop, mobile, and tablet screens.

items.title: Instant Download
items.description: Download your generated wallpapers immediately. Use them on any device, personal or commercial.

usage.title: How It Works
usage.description: Create stunning AI wallpapers in three simple steps

items.title: Describe Your Wallpaper
items.description: Type a detailed description of the wallpaper you want. Be creative - cosmic landscapes, abstract patterns, nature scenes, anything!

items.title: Choose AI Model
items.description: Select from our range of AI models, each optimized for different styles and resolutions.

items.title: Generate & Download
items.description: Click generate and watch your wallpaper come to life in seconds. Download in high resolution.

features.title: Why Choose AI Wallpaper
features.description: Everything you need to create beautiful, unique wallpapers with artificial intelligence.

items.title: Unlimited Creativity
items.description: No limits on what you can create. From photo-realistic landscapes to abstract digital art.

items.title: Credits System
items.description: Pay only for what you generate. Buy credit packs and use them whenever you want.

items.title: Multiple Resolutions
items.description: Generate wallpapers optimized for all screen sizes and resolutions.

items.title: Fast Generation
items.description: Get your wallpaper in seconds, not minutes. Our AI models are optimized for speed.

items.title: Commercial Use
items.description: Use generated wallpapers for personal and commercial projects.

items.title: Secure & Private
items.description: Your prompts and generated images are private. We never share your data.

items.question: What is AI Wallpaper?
items.answer: AI Wallpaper is an AI-powered wallpaper generator that creates unique, high-quality wallpapers based on your text descriptions. Simply type what you want, and our AI will create it for you.

items.question: How does the credits system work?
items.answer: Each wallpaper generation costs 2 credits. New users get free credits to start. You can purchase additional credit packs from our pricing page at any time.

items.question: What resolution are the wallpapers?
items.answer: Our AI generates wallpapers in high resolution suitable for all devices - desktop monitors, laptops, tablets, and smartphones.

items.question: Can I use generated wallpapers commercially?
items.answer: Yes! All wallpapers you generate are yours to use. Please review our Terms of Service for detailed usage rights and restrictions.

items.question: How fast is wallpaper generation?
items.answer: Most wallpapers are generated within seconds. Complex or high-resolution requests may take slightly longer, but we optimize for speed without compromising quality.

cta.title: Ready to Create Your AI Wallpaper?
cta.description: Start generating stunning wallpapers in seconds. Free credits available for new users.
